parameters.query: WITH candidates AS(SELECT t.id FROM drama.video_generation_tasks t LEFT JOIN drama.shot_videos v ON v.shot_id=t.shot_id AND v.generation_version=t.generation_version AND v.is_current WHERE((t.status='processing'AND(t.next_poll_at IS NULL OR t.next_poll_at<=now()))OR(t.status='succeeded'AND v.auto_qc_status='pending'))AND($1::text IS NULL OR t.task_id=$1)AND($2::text IS NULL OR t.project_id=$2)ORDER BY t.next_poll_at NULLS FIRST,t.created_at LIMIT $3 FOR UPDATE OF t SKIP LOCKED),claimed AS(UPDATE drama.video_generation_tasks t SET next_poll_at=now()+make_interval(secs=>$4),response_payload=jsonb_set(coalesce(t.response_payload,'{}'::jsonb),'{_poll_claim_token}',to_jsonb($5::text),true)FROM candidates c WHERE t.id=c.id RETURNING t.*)SELECT c.*,si.storyboard_id,si.generation_version source_image_generation_version,coalesce(c.request_payload->>'image_url',si.storage_url,si.image_url)source_image_url,sh.duration_seconds shot_duration,sh.camera_motion,sh.action_description FROM claimed c LEFT JOIN drama.storyboard_images si ON si.storyboard_image_id=c.storyboard_image_id LEFT JOIN drama.storyboard_shots sh ON sh.shot_id=c.shot_id;

parameters.jsCode: const t=$('Switch Video Poll Route').item.json,s=String($json.status||'processing').toLowerCase(),done=['succeeded','completed','success'].includes(s),failed=['failed','error','cancelled'].includes(s),raw=$json.videos||($json.video?[$json.video]:$json.url?[{url:$json.url}]:[]),videos=raw.map(v=>typeof v==='string'?{url:v}:v);if(done&&(!videos.length||videos.some(v=>!v.url||/^data:/i.test(v.url)||v.base64||v.video_base64)))throw new Error('VIDEO_PROVIDER_INVALID_RESPONSE: completed task must return video URL, never base64');return [{json:{...t,new_status:done?'succeeded':failed?'failed':'processing',new_poll_count:Number(t.poll_count)+1,result:{success:!failed,provider:t.provider,model:t.model,mode:'async',provider_task_id:t.provider_task_id,status:done?'succeeded':failed?'failed':'processing',videos:done?videos:[],usage:{video_count:done?videos.length:0,duration_seconds:Number($json.usage?.duration_seconds||0),estimated_cost:Number($json.usage?.estimated_cost||t.estimated_cost||0)},error:failed?{code:'VIDEO_PROVIDER_INVALID_RESPONSE',message:String($json.error?.message||$json.error||'provider failed'),retryable:false}:null,task_id:t.task_id}}}];

const x=$json,wait=Number($env.VIDEO_MAX_WAIT_MINUTES||30)*60000,expired=!x.started_at||Date.now()-new Date(x.started_at).getTime()>wait;if(x.new_status==='processing'&&(x.new_poll_count>=Number(x.max_poll_count)||expired)){x.new_status='timeout';x.result={...x.result,success:false,status:'timeout',error:{code:'VIDEO_TASK_TIMEOUT',message:'poll count or wait limit exceeded',retryable:false}}}return [{json:x}];

0:v:0 '+(keepAudio?'-map 0:a? ':'-an ')+'-vf '+q(vf)+' -r '+fps+' -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -movflags +faststart '+q(target));}parts.push(q(ffmpeg)+' -y -v error -ss 0.1 -i '+q(target)+' -frames:v 1 '+q(thumb));parts.push(q(ffprobe)+' -v error -show_entries format=duration,size,format_name:stream=index,codec_type,codec_name,width,height,avg_frame_rate,r_frame_rate -of json '+q(target));parts.push(q(ffmpeg)+' -hide_banner -nostats -i '+q(target)+' -vf '+q('blackdetect=d=0.2:pix_th=0.10,freezedetect=n=-50dB:d=1')+' -an -f null -');const key=[x.project_id,x.shot_id,x.generation_version,'transcode_video',target].join(':'),mediaId='mediajob_'+crypto.createHash('sha1').update(key).digest('hex').slice(0,20),videoId='video_'+crypto.createHash('sha1').update(x.shot_id+':'+x.generation_version).digest('hex').slice(0,20),rel=['shot-videos',x.project_id,x.episode_id,x.shot_id,file].join('/'),thumbRel=['thumbnails',x.project_id,x.episode_id,path.basename(thumb)].join('/'),publicBase=($env.MEDIA_PUBLIC_BASE_URL||'http://localhost:8088').replace(/[/]$/,'');return [{json:{...x,shot_video_id:videoId,media_job_id:mediaId,media_job_key:key,media_command:parts.join('; '),video_target_path:target,video_storage_url:target,video_public_url:publicBase+'/'+rel,thumbnail_path:thumb,thumbnail_url:publicBase+'/'+thumbRel,provider_original_url:v.url||null,requested_width:width,requested_height:height,requested_fps:fps,requested_duration:duration,requested_aspect:r.aspect_ratio||v.aspect_ratio||width+':'+height,reference_image_url:x.source_image_url||v.source_image_url,storyboard_id:x.storyboard_id,source_image_generation_version:Number(x.source_image_generation_version||1)}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO drama.media_processing_jobs(job_id,idempotency_key,project_id,episode_id,entity_type,entity_id,operation,input_url,output_url,parameters,status,started_at)VALUES($1,$2,$3,$4,'shot_video',$5,'transcode_video',$6,$7,jsonb_build_object('task_id',$8::text,'generation_version',$9::int,'requested_width',$10::int,'requested_height',$11::int,'requested_fps',$12::numeric,'requested_duration',$13::numeric),'processing',now())ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key)DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.media_processing_jobs.status IN('failed','timeout')THEN'processing'ELSE drama.media_processing_jobs.status END,error_code=NULL,error_message=NULL,started_at=CASE WHEN drama.media_processing_jobs.status IN('failed','timeout')THEN now()ELSE drama.media_processing_jobs.started_at END RETURNING $14::jsonb request;

failed automatic QC',retryable:true}:null,result={...x.result,status:fatal?'failed':'succeeded',videos:[{url:x.video_public_url,original_url:x.provider_original_url,storage_url:x.video_storage_url,thumbnail_url:x.thumbnail_url,duration_seconds:duration,width,height,fps,codec:video.codec_name||null,has_audio:Boolean(audio),content_hash:hash}],error};return [{json:{...x,new_status:fatal?'failed':'succeeded',result,actual_duration:duration,actual_width:width,actual_height:height,actual_fps:fps,codec:video.codec_name||null,has_audio:Boolean(audio),content_hash:hash,auto_qc_status:status,auto_qc_report:report}}];

nodes.name: Parse Video Probe and Comprehensive QC

END,next_poll_at=NULL,completed_at=now(),error_code=$4::text,error_message=$5::text WHERE task_id=$6 RETURNING *),dup AS(SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos o WHERE o.project_id=(SELECT dup)),true),'{warnings}',coalesce($29::jsonb->'warnings','[]'::jsonb)||CASE WHEN(SELECT duplicate FROM dup)THEN'["content_hash_duplicate"]'::jsonb ELSE'[]'::jsonb END,true),'pending',true ON CONFLICT(shot_id,generation_version)DO UPDATE SET provider_task_id=excluded.provider_task_id,actual_duration_seconds=excluded.actual_duration_seconds,width=excluded.width,height=excluded.height,fps=excluded.fps,codec=excluded.codec,has_audio=excluded.has_audio,original_url=excluded.original_url,storage_url=excluded.storage_url,thumbnail_url=excluded.thumbnail_url,content_hash=excluded.content_hash,status=excluded.status,auto_qc_status=excluded.auto_qc_status,auto_qc_report=excluded.auto_qc_report,is_current=true RETURNING *),rv AS(INSERT INTO drama.review_tasks(review_id,project_id,stage,entity_type,entity_id,review_status,metadata)SELECT 'review_'||substr(md5(v.shot_video_id),1,20),v.project_id,'shot_video','shot_video',v.shot_video_id,'pending',jsonb_build_object('shot_id',v.shot_id,'generation_version',v.generation_version,'auto_qc_status',v.auto_qc_status)FROM v WHERE $1='succeeded'ON CONFLICT(review_id)DO NOTHING),mj AS(UPDATE drama.media_processing_jobs SET status=CASE WHEN $1='succeeded'THEN'succeeded'ELSE'failed'END,output_url=$25,error_code=$4::text,error_message=$5::text,completed_at=now()WHERE job_id=$30),flags AS(SELECT NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND i.is_current AND i.review_status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos sv WHERE sv.shot_id=i.shot_id AND sv.is_current AND sv.status='succeeded'AND sv.auto_qc_status IN('passed','warning')))video_generated,EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND i.is_current AND i.review_status='approved')AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND i.is_current AND i.review_status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.shot_videos sv WHERE sv.shot_id=i.shot_id AND sv.is_current AND sv.review_status='approved'))AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es WHERE es.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND es.status='approved')AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es JOIN drama.dialogues d ON d.episode_id=es.episode_id WHERE es.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND es.status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.dialogue_audio da WHERE da.dialogue_id=d.dialogue_id AND da.is_current AND da.status='succeeded'AND da.auto_qc_status IN('passed','warning')))AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_scripts es WHERE es.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)AND es.status='approved'AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.episode_audio_plans ap WHERE ap.episode_id=es.episode_id AND ap.status='ready'))full_done),next_state AS(SELECT p.project_id,CASE WHEN f.full_done THEN'stage_4_completed'WHEN p.current_stage IN('audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_plan_completed')THEN p.current_stage WHEN f.video_generated THEN'shot_video_review'ELSE'video_processing'END next_stage,CASE WHEN f.full_done THEN'stage_4_completed'WHEN p.current_stage IN('audio_processing','audio_review','audio_ready','voice_profile_review','voice_profiles_locked','dialogue_audio_generated','audio_plan_completed')THEN p.status WHEN f.video_generated THEN'waiting_shot_video_review'ELSE'video_processing'END next_status FROM drama.projects p CROSS JOIN flags f WHERE p.project_id=(SELECT project_id FROM t)),pr AS(UPDATE drama.projects p SET current_stage=n.next_stage,status=n.next_status FROM next_state n WHERE p.project_id=n.project_id)SELECT(SELECT task_id FROM t)task_id,(SELECT shot_video_id FROM v)shot_video_id;

nodes.name: Save Video Version QC Review and Project

parameters.query: WITH t AS(UPDATE drama.video_generation_tasks SET status=$1,poll_count=$2,response_payload=$3::jsonb,progress=CASE WHEN $1='processing'THEN greatest(progress,least(99,$4::numeric))ELSE progress END,next_poll_at=CASE WHEN $1='processing'THEN now()+make_interval(secs=>$5)ELSE NULL END,completed_at=CASE WHEN $1 IN('failed','timeout')THEN now()ELSE completed_at END,error_code=$6::text,error_message=$7::text WHERE task_id=$8 RETURNING *),v AS(UPDATE drama.shot_videos SET status=CASE WHEN $1='processing'THEN'processing'WHEN $1='timeout'THEN'timeout'ELSE'failed'END,auto_qc_status=CASE WHEN $1 IN('failed','timeout')THEN'failed'ELSE auto_qc_status END,auto_qc_report=CASE WHEN $1 IN('failed','timeout')THEN jsonb_build_object('status','failed','error_code',$6::text,'error_message',$7::text)ELSE auto_qc_report END WHERE shot_id=(SELECT shot_id FROM t)AND generation_version=(SELECT generation_version FROM t))SELECT task_id,status FROM t;

parameters.jsCode: let t={};try{t=$('Loop Claimed Video Tasks').item.json||{};}catch(e){}let m=String($json.error?.message||$json.message||'video polling or processing failed').replace(/Bearer\s+\S+/gi,'Bearer [REDACTED]').replace(/([?&](?:key|token|signature)=)[^&\s]+/gi,'$1[REDACTED]');const code=/download/i.test(m)?'VIDEO_DOWNLOAD_FAILED':/ffprobe|file|media|command/i.test(m)?'VIDEO_FILE_INVALID':/timeout/i.test(m)?'VIDEO_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT':'VIDEO_PROVIDER_INVALID_RESPONSE';return [{json:{...t,new_status:'failed',new_poll_count:Number(t.poll_count||0)+1,result:{success:false,provider:t.provider||null,model:t.model||null,status:'failed',videos:[],error:{code,message:m,retryable:/timeout|network|429|5\d\d/i.test(m)},task_id:t.task_id||null}}}];
